intro: Potentilla basilii, also known as Silver Buffalo Berry, is a shrub native to Western North America with a high concentration of medicinal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage caused by free radicals. The bioactive constituents of Potentilla basilii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
